claim: Structural position assumption: slice(0, -1) unconditionally treats the LAST assert
smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: [NEW]
; LINE: 261
; Structural position assumption: slice(0, -1) unconditionally treats the LAST assert
; as the negated property to strip. If the last assert is a transition (not a negation),
; stripping it removes a real precondition from the self-check.
; A block whose full precondition set is unsat can then appear sat in the self-check,
; passing the filter and poisoning the merged consistency formula.
; Code transitions:
;   - num_asserts >= 2 (guard already passed)
;   - self_check_asserts = num_asserts - 1 (slice strips last)
;   - last_assert_is_transition = 1 (structural assumption violated)
;   - self_check_is_sat: missing constraint → appears satisfiable
;   - full_precondition_set_is_unsat: with last assert included → contradictory
(declare-const num_asserts Int)
(declare-const self_check_asserts Int)
(declare-const last_assert_is_transition Int)  ; 1 = last assert is a precondition, not negation
(declare-const self_check_unsat Int)           ; 1 = self-check returns unsat
(declare-const full_set_unsat Int)             ; 1 = all asserts together are unsat
(declare-const block_included Int)             ; 1 = pushed to namespacedBlocks
; Code transition: assertLines.length >= 2 (guard already passed)
(assert (>= num_asserts 2))
; Code transition: slice(0, -1) produces num_asserts - 1 precondition asserts
(assert (= self_check_asserts (- num_asserts 1)))
; Scenario: last assert is a real transition constraint, not the negated property
(assert (= last_assert_is_transition 1))
; Code transition: missing the last constraint → self-check is satisfiable
(assert (=> (= last_assert_is_transition 1) (= self_check_unsat 0)))
; But the block's complete precondition set IS self-contradictory
(assert (= full_set_unsat 1))
; Code transition: self_check_unsat = 0 → block is NOT skipped
(assert (=> (= self_check_unsat 0) (= block_included 1)))
; Violation: self-contradictory block included because structural assumption fails
(assert (= block_included 1))
(assert (= full_set_unsat 1))
(check-sat)
